title: Serenal Server Modpack
description: This modpack is based around the Conquest Refabricated mod which we use in combination with other mods like Aquila, the RPG series to create a living world.
body:
**Installation Guide:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1_VRUaoy6GI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




Explore a living medieval fantasy world built by Sebb, Kaiser, Vex, Lendill and others! The Serenal server is a huge project with the main goal to create a RPG world in a medieval / fantasy setting. 

From island inspired by the Skellige islands from the Witcher, to iconic medieval cities you can explore our world and join us as a builder if you like. 

The main goal of this modpack is to make the process of joining the server easier. Nearly everything is included. Other files can be downloaded on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2YX6sfr2PQ) 
This includes files for the prerendered worldmap, options files and a server specific mod. 

Disclaimer: 
All mods except Aquila and Aquila Core featured in this pack are made by 3rd-party developers. Aquila and Aquila Core are made by me.
